meta.note: Verified policies for major US stadiums and arenas

venues.name: Mercedes-Benz Stadium
venues.policy: Clear bag policy strictly enforced. Allowed: one clear plastic, vinyl, or PVC bag (no larger than 12″×6″×12″); one small clutch or purse (no larger than 4.5″×6.5″)

venues.name: State Farm Arena
venues.policy: Clear bag policy enforced. One clear bag up to 12″×6″×12″; one small clutch no larger than 4.5″×6.5″. No backpacks.

venues.name: Truist Park
venues.policy: Clear bag policy enforced. Clear plastic bag no larger than 16″×16″×8″. One-gallon clear ziplock also permitted. Small clutch up to 4″×7″ also permitted.

venues.name: MetLife Stadium
venues.policy: NFL team clear bag policy enforced. Clear bag 12″×6″×12″ max; one-gallon ziplock; small clutch 4.5″×6.5″. FIFA 2026 Final venue.

venues.name: SoFi Stadium
venues.policy: NFL clear bag policy. 12″×6″×12″ max. Strictly enforced. No backpacks or non-clear bags of any size.
